curation_notes: The patch modifies a single non-test source file (AvroConverters.java) by adding a SERIALIZABLE_PACKAGES allowlist and a checkSecurity method to the FieldStringableConverter inner class. The vulnerability was in the FieldStringableConverter constructor which accepted arbitrary Java classes from schema metadata for reflection-based instantiation without any package validation. The fix adds a static allowlist of trusted packages and a security check that rejects classes outside those packages. Two test files were also added/modified but are excluded from locations. Sibling files (AvroRecordConverter, AvroIndexedRecordConverter) were checked — AvroRecordConverter calls FieldStringableConverter but the vulnerability is in the converter class itself; AvroIndexedRecordConverter does not use this code path. Vulnerability class insecure-deserialization confirmed: CWE-502 maps directly and the patch addresses unrestricted class instantiation from untrusted schema data.
